SET(JSON_SCHEMA_SRCS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/json-schema-draft7.json.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/json-validator.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/string-format-check.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/json-uri.cpp
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/json-patch.cpp
    PARENT_SCOPE
)
